title: ProxySQL
description: Live operational view of ProxySQL — connection pool, query routing, query cache, top queries, command latency. Sourced directly from ProxySQL admin port 6032 (stats_* tables). Current-state only — no historical time-series.

panels.title: Client Connections
panels.description: Active frontend connections from apps to ProxySQL right now

targets.rawSql: SELECT Variable_Value+0 AS value FROM stats_mysql_global WHERE Variable_Name='Client_Connections_connected'

panels.title: Active Transactions
panels.description: Transactions currently open across all backends. High value = potential lock contention.

targets.rawSql: SELECT Variable_Value+0 AS value FROM stats_mysql_global WHERE Variable_Name='Active_Transactions'

panels.title: Total Questions
panels.description: Cumulative queries routed since ProxySQL started

targets.rawSql: SELECT Variable_Value+0 AS value FROM stats_mysql_global WHERE Variable_Name='Questions'

panels.title: Query Cache Hit Rate
panels.description: GET_OK / GET. Only counting queries that match a cache_ttl rule. <80% = cache not effective for matched queries.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * MAX(CASE WHEN Variable_Name='Query_Cache_count_GET_OK' THEN Variable_Value+0 END) / NULLIF(MAX(CASE WHEN Variable_Name='Query_Cache_count_GET' THEN Variable_Value+0 END), 0), 1) AS value FROM stats_mysql_global WHERE Variable_Name IN ('Query_Cache_count_GET','Query_Cache_count_GET_OK')

panels.title: Cache Entries
panels.description: Distinct query results currently held in ProxySQL query cache

targets.rawSql: SELECT Variable_Value+0 AS value FROM stats_mysql_global WHERE Variable_Name='Query_Cache_Entries'

panels.title: Cache Memory
panels.description: RAM used by ProxySQL query cache

targets.rawSql: SELECT Variable_Value+0 AS value FROM stats_mysql_global WHERE Variable_Name='Query_Cache_Memory_bytes'

panels.title: Connection Pool — backends
panels.description: One row per backend server. ConnUsed = active, ConnFree = idle in pool. Latency = backend round-trip in ms. High ConnUsed with zero ConnFree = pool exhausted.

targets.rawSql: SELECT hostgroup AS HG, srv_host AS Host, srv_port AS Port, status AS Status, ConnUsed AS `Used`, ConnFree AS `Free`, ConnOK AS `OK`, ConnERR AS `Errors`, Queries, ROUND(Latency_us/1000.0, 2) AS `Latency ms`, ROUND(Bytes_data_sent/1048576.0, 2) AS `Sent MB`, ROUND(Bytes_data_recv/1048576.0, 2) AS `Recv MB` FROM stats_mysql_connection_pool ORDER BY hostgroup, srv_host

panels.title: Top Queries by Execution Count
panels.description: Queries ProxySQL has seen since startup, ordered by call count. cache_entries > 0 = result is currently in query cache. Avg ms = average latency including cache hits (cache hits are near-zero, so high avg means poor cache coverage).

targets.rawSql: SELECT hostgroup AS HG, CASE WHEN hostgroup=0 THEN 'write' WHEN hostgroup=1 THEN 'read' ELSE hostgroup END AS Route, count_star AS Count, ROUND(sum_time/NULLIF(count_star,0)/1000.0, 2) AS `Avg ms`, ROUND(min_time/1000.0, 2) AS `Min ms`, ROUND(max_time/1000.0, 2) AS `Max ms`, cache_entries AS Cached, SUBSTRING(digest_text, 1, 100) AS `Query (truncated)` FROM stats_mysql_query_digest ORDER BY count_star DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Command Latency Distribution
panels.description: Latency buckets per SQL command type since startup. Useful for spotting slow INSERT/UPDATE patterns or unexpected SELECT latency spikes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT Command, Total_cnt AS Count, ROUND(Total_Time_us/NULLIF(Total_cnt,0)/1000.0, 2) AS `Avg ms`, cnt_100us AS `<0.1ms`, cnt_500us AS `<0.5ms`, cnt_1ms AS `<1ms`, cnt_5ms AS `<5ms`, cnt_10ms AS `<10ms`, cnt_50ms AS `<50ms`, cnt_100ms AS `<100ms`, cnt_500ms AS `<500ms`, cnt_1s AS `<1s`, cnt_inf AS `>1s` FROM stats_mysql_commands_counters WHERE Total_cnt > 0 ORDER BY Total_cnt DESC

panels.title: Query Cache — detailed counters
panels.description: All Query_Cache_* variables. GET = total lookups, GET_OK = hits (served from cache), SET = misses written to cache. Hit rate = GET_OK / GET.

targets.rawSql: SELECT Variable_Name AS Metric, Variable_Value+0 AS Value FROM stats_mysql_global WHERE Variable_Name LIKE 'Query_Cache%' ORDER BY Variable_Name

panels.title: Connection & Traffic Counters
panels.description: Cumulative counters since ProxySQL started. Aborted connections = clients disconnected unexpectedly.

targets.rawSql: SELECT Variable_Name AS Metric, Variable_Value+0 AS Value FROM stats_mysql_global WHERE Variable_Name IN ('Client_Connections_connected','Client_Connections_created','Client_Connections_aborted','Server_Connections_connected','Server_Connections_created','Server_Connections_aborted','Questions','Slow_queries','Active_Transactions','mysql_backend_buffers_bytes','mysql_frontend_buffers_bytes') ORDER BY Variable_Name
